metadata.description: Singapore Physics curriculum covering O-Level and JC H2 A-Level, with prerequisite ordering

nodes.label: SI Units & Prefixes
nodes.description: Base and derived SI units; standard prefixes (nano to mega); unit conversions

nodes.label: Scalars & Vectors
nodes.description: Distinguishing scalars and vectors; addition of vectors by graphical method

nodes.label: Measurement Techniques
nodes.description: Use of rulers, vernier calipers, micrometers, measuring cylinders, clocks; precision and accuracy

nodes.label: Speed & Velocity
nodes.description: Distance vs displacement; speed vs velocity; average and instantaneous speed

nodes.label: Acceleration
nodes.description: Definition of acceleration; uniform and non-uniform acceleration; deceleration

nodes.label: Distance-Time & Velocity-Time Graphs
nodes.description: Interpreting and sketching d-t and v-t graphs; gradient and area under v-t graph

nodes.label: Free Fall & Acceleration Due to Gravity
nodes.description: Acceleration of free fall g; objects falling with and without air resistance

nodes.label: Newton's Laws of Motion
nodes.description: Inertia and Newton's first law; F=ma (second law); action-reaction pairs (third law)

nodes.label: Mass & Weight
nodes.description: Distinction between mass and weight; gravitational field strength; W = mg

nodes.label: Friction
nodes.description: Static and kinetic friction; effects of friction; reducing friction

nodes.label: Momentum
nodes.description: Linear momentum p = mv; conservation of momentum; collisions and explosions

nodes.label: Moments of Forces
nodes.description: Moment = force x perpendicular distance; principle of moments; torque

nodes.label: Centre of Gravity & Stability
nodes.description: Centre of gravity; stable, unstable and neutral equilibrium; conditions for equilibrium

nodes.label: Pressure in Solids
nodes.description: Pressure = force / area; applications of high and low pressure

nodes.label: Pressure in Liquids
nodes.description: Pressure at a depth in a liquid (p = hpg); hydraulic systems; manometers

nodes.label: Atmospheric Pressure
nodes.description: Atmospheric pressure; barometers; variation with altitude

nodes.label: Forms & Sources of Energy
nodes.description: Kinetic, potential (gravitational, elastic, chemical), nuclear, thermal, electrical, light, sound energy

nodes.label: Energy Conversion & Conservation
nodes.description: Principle of conservation of energy; energy conversion in practical devices; efficiency

nodes.label: Work Done
nodes.description: Work = force x distance moved in direction of force; work done against gravity and friction

nodes.label: Power & Efficiency
nodes.description: Power = work done / time; efficiency = useful energy output / total energy input

nodes.label: Kinetic Model of Matter
nodes.description: Three states of matter; particle arrangement, motion and energy; Brownian motion as evidence

nodes.label: Temperature
nodes.description: Temperature as measure of degree of hotness; Celsius and thermodynamic scales; thermometers and calibration

nodes.label: Thermal Expansion
nodes.description: Expansion and contraction of solids, liquids and gases; applications and consequences

nodes.label: Heat Capacity & Specific Heat Capacity
nodes.description: Heat capacity; specific heat capacity; Q = mc delta-T; experimental determination

nodes.label: Latent Heat
nodes.description: Specific latent heat of fusion and vaporisation; Q = mL; heating and cooling curves

nodes.label: Melting & Boiling
nodes.description: Melting and solidification; boiling and condensation; evaporation vs boiling; effect of pressure on boiling point

nodes.label: Conduction
nodes.description: Thermal conduction through solids; conductors and insulators; molecular explanation

nodes.label: Convection
nodes.description: Convection currents in fluids; explanation in terms of density changes; applications

nodes.label: Radiation
nodes.description: Infrared radiation; emission and absorption; factors affecting rate; applications (vacuum flask, greenhouse effect)

nodes.label: General Wave Properties
nodes.description: Transverse and longitudinal waves; amplitude, wavelength, frequency, period, wave speed; v = f lambda

nodes.label: Wave Phenomena
nodes.description: Reflection, refraction, diffraction of waves; ripple tank demonstrations

nodes.label: Reflection of Light
nodes.description: Laws of reflection; plane mirrors; image formation; regular and diffuse reflection

nodes.label: Refraction of Light
nodes.description: Laws of refraction; refractive index; Snell's law; real and apparent depth

nodes.label: Total Internal Reflection
nodes.description: Critical angle; conditions for total internal reflection; applications (optical fibres, prisms)

nodes.label: Thin Converging Lenses
nodes.description: Converging lens; focal length; ray diagrams; image characteristics; magnification

nodes.label: Electromagnetic Spectrum
nodes.description: Properties common to all EM waves; regions of the EM spectrum; uses and hazards of each type

nodes.label: Sound
nodes.description: Production and propagation of sound; speed of sound in different media; echo; ultrasound applications

nodes.label: Pitch, Loudness & Quality of Sound
nodes.description: Relationship of pitch to frequency, loudness to amplitude; waveform displays on CRO

nodes.label: Static Electricity
nodes.description: Positive and negative charges; charging by friction and induction; electric field lines; hazards and applications

nodes.label: Electric Field
nodes.description: Electric field as region of force; field patterns around point charges and parallel plates

nodes.label: Current, EMF & Potential Difference
nodes.description: Conventional current; electron flow; EMF of a source; potential difference; I = Q/t; V = W/Q

nodes.label: Resistance & Ohm's Law
nodes.description: Resistance R = V/I; Ohm's law; factors affecting resistance; I-V characteristics of ohmic and non-ohmic conductors

nodes.label: Series & Parallel Circuits
nodes.description: Current and voltage rules in series and parallel; combined resistance calculations

nodes.label: Circuit Components
nodes.description: Circuit symbols and diagrams; thermistors, LDRs, diodes, LEDs, relays, transistors; potential divider

nodes.label: Electrical Energy & Power
nodes.description: E = VIt; P = VI = I^2R = V^2/R; kilowatt-hour; cost of electricity

nodes.label: Practical Electricity & Safety
nodes.description: Household wiring (live, neutral, earth); fuses and circuit breakers; earthing; safety precautions; double insulation

nodes.label: Magnets & Magnetic Fields
nodes.description: Permanent magnets; magnetic materials; magnetic field patterns; plotting field lines with compass

nodes.label: Electromagnets
nodes.description: Magnetic effect of a current; solenoids; electromagnets; applications (relay, circuit breaker, bell)

nodes.label: Force on Current-Carrying Conductor
nodes.description: Motor effect; Fleming's left-hand rule; factors affecting force; DC motor

nodes.label: Electromagnetic Induction
nodes.description: Faraday's experiments; factors affecting induced EMF; AC generator; transformer; Lenz's law (direction only)

nodes.label: Atomic Model
nodes.description: Nuclear model of the atom; protons, neutrons, electrons; proton/nucleon number; isotopes

nodes.label: Radioactive Emission
nodes.description: Properties of alpha, beta and gamma radiation; penetrating power; ionising ability; deflection in fields

nodes.label: Radioactive Decay & Half-Life
nodes.description: Random nature of decay; half-life; decay curves; calculations involving half-life

nodes.label: Nuclear Reactions
nodes.description: Nuclear equations for alpha and beta decay; fission and fusion (descriptive); nuclear energy

nodes.label: Uses & Hazards of Radioactivity
nodes.description: Applications (medical, industrial, dating); safety precautions; background radiation; nuclear waste

nodes.label: Errors & Uncertainties
nodes.description: Systematic and random errors; precision and accuracy; propagation of uncertainties; percentage uncertainty

nodes.label: Dimensional Analysis
nodes.description: Dimensions of physical quantities; checking homogeneity of equations; deriving relationships

nodes.label: Kinematics in Two Dimensions
nodes.description: 2D motion; vector components; relative velocity; equations of motion for uniform acceleration

nodes.label: Projectile Motion
nodes.description: Independence of horizontal and vertical motion; trajectory calculations; range and time of flight

nodes.label: Newton's Laws (H2)
nodes.description: Newton's laws revisited with rigour; net force and acceleration; connected bodies; non-inertial frames

nodes.label: Impulse & Momentum (H2)
nodes.description: Impulse as F delta-t; conservation of linear momentum in 2D; elastic and inelastic collisions

nodes.label: Types of Forces
nodes.description: Contact and non-contact forces; weight, normal, tension, friction, drag, upthrust; free-body diagrams

nodes.label: Equilibrium of Forces
nodes.description: Conditions for translational and rotational equilibrium; triangle and polygon of forces; torque

nodes.label: Upthrust & Viscous Drag
nodes.description: Archimedes' principle; viscous drag; terminal velocity; Stokes' law

nodes.label: Work-Energy Theorem
nodes.description: Work done by constant and variable forces; work-energy theorem; kinetic energy

nodes.label: Potential Energy & Energy Diagrams
nodes.description: Gravitational and elastic potential energy; potential energy curves; stable and unstable equilibrium from PE graphs

nodes.label: Power (H2)
nodes.description: P = Fv; efficiency; power dissipation

nodes.label: Uniform Circular Motion
nodes.description: Angular velocity; centripetal acceleration a = v^2/r; centripetal force; applications (banked curves, orbits)

nodes.label: Newton's Law of Gravitation
nodes.description: Universal gravitational constant G; F = GMm/r^2; gravitational field strength g = GM/r^2

nodes.label: Gravitational Potential & Energy
nodes.description: Gravitational potential phi = -GM/r; gravitational PE; escape velocity; potential-distance graphs

nodes.label: Satellite Motion & Orbits
nodes.description: Geostationary and polar orbits; orbital speed and period; weightlessness in orbit

nodes.label: Simple Harmonic Motion
nodes.description: Defining equation a = -omega^2 x; displacement, velocity, acceleration graphs; T and f of SHM systems

nodes.label: Energy in SHM
nodes.description: KE and PE variation in SHM; total energy; energy-displacement graphs

nodes.label: Damping & Resonance
nodes.description: Free and forced oscillations; light, critical and heavy damping; resonance; effects of damping on resonance

nodes.label: Temperature & Thermodynamic Scale
nodes.description: Thermal equilibrium; absolute zero; thermodynamic (Kelvin) scale; empirical temperature scales

nodes.label: Ideal Gas Laws
nodes.description: Boyle's, Charles's and pressure laws; ideal gas equation pV = nRT; mole concept for gases

nodes.label: Kinetic Theory of Gases
nodes.description: Assumptions of kinetic theory; derivation of p = (1/3)Nm<c^2>/V; root-mean-square speed; pV = NkT

nodes.label: Internal Energy
nodes.description: Internal energy as sum of random KE and PE of molecules; relation to temperature for ideal gas

nodes.label: First Law of Thermodynamics
nodes.description: delta-U = q + W; sign conventions; isothermal, adiabatic, isobaric and isovolumetric processes

nodes.label: Wave Motion (H2)
nodes.description: Progressive waves; displacement-distance and displacement-time graphs; intensity; polarisation

nodes.label: Polarisation
nodes.description: Polarisation of transverse waves; Malus's law; polaroid filters; applications (LCD, sunglasses)

nodes.label: Wave Intensity
nodes.description: Intensity proportional to amplitude squared; inverse square law for point sources

nodes.label: Principle of Superposition
nodes.description: Superposition of waves; constructive and destructive interference; path difference and phase difference

nodes.label: Two-Source Interference
nodes.description: Young's double-slit experiment; fringe spacing formula; coherence; conditions for observable interference

nodes.label: Diffraction
nodes.description: Single-slit diffraction; effect of slit width; diffraction of water waves, sound and light

nodes.label: Diffraction Grating
nodes.description: d sin theta = n lambda; multiple-slit interference; applications in spectroscopy

nodes.label: Stationary Waves
nodes.description: Formation of stationary waves; nodes and antinodes; harmonics on strings and in pipes

nodes.label: Coulomb's Law
nodes.description: F = kQq/r^2; permittivity of free space; comparison with gravitational force

nodes.label: Electric Field Strength
nodes.description: E = F/q; field due to point charge E = kQ/r^2; uniform field E = V/d; field line patterns

nodes.label: Electric Potential & Energy
nodes.description: Electric potential V = kQ/r; potential energy U = kQq/r; equipotential lines; potential-distance graphs

nodes.label: Motion of Charged Particles in Electric Fields
nodes.description: Acceleration and deflection of charges in uniform electric fields; applications (CRT, velocity selector)

nodes.label: Current & Resistance (H2)
nodes.description: Drift velocity; resistivity; I-V characteristics; temperature dependence of resistance

nodes.label: EMF & Internal Resistance
nodes.description: EMF as energy per unit charge; internal resistance; terminal potential difference; V = E - Ir

nodes.label: Kirchhoff's Laws
nodes.description: Kirchhoff's first law (junction rule); second law (loop rule); solving complex circuits

nodes.label: Potential Divider (H2)
nodes.description: Potential divider with fixed and variable resistors; use of thermistors and LDRs; potentiometer

nodes.label: Force on Current-Carrying Conductor (H2)
nodes.description: F = BIL sin theta; magnetic flux density B; Fleming's left-hand rule; torque on a coil

nodes.label: Force on Moving Charge
nodes.description: F = Bqv sin theta; circular motion of charges in magnetic fields; velocity selector; Hall effect

nodes.label: Magnetic Flux & Flux Linkage
nodes.description: Magnetic flux Phi = BA cos theta; flux linkage N Phi; units (weber, weber-turn)

nodes.label: Faraday's & Lenz's Laws
nodes.description: Faraday's law of electromagnetic induction; Lenz's law; induced EMF calculations; eddy currents

nodes.label: AC Generator & Transformer
nodes.description: Working principle of AC generators; ideal transformers; Vs/Vp = Ns/Np; power transmission

nodes.label: Alternating Currents
nodes.description: Sinusoidal AC; peak and RMS values; relationship between peak and RMS; AC power P = Irms^2 R

nodes.label: Rectification
nodes.description: Half-wave and full-wave rectification using diodes; smoothing with capacitors; output waveforms

nodes.label: Photoelectric Effect
nodes.description: Observations; Einstein's photoelectric equation; work function; threshold frequency; stopping potential

nodes.label: Photons & Energy Levels
nodes.description: E = hf; energy levels of atoms; emission and absorption spectra; line spectra as evidence for energy levels

nodes.label: Wave-Particle Duality
nodes.description: De Broglie wavelength lambda = h/p; electron diffraction; wave-particle duality of light and matter

nodes.label: Heisenberg Uncertainty Principle
nodes.description: Uncertainty in position and momentum; delta-x delta-p >= h/(4 pi); implications for measurement

nodes.label: Nuclear Structure
nodes.description: Constituents of the nucleus; nucleon and proton number; isotopes; nuclear size and density

nodes.label: Mass-Energy Equivalence
nodes.description: E = mc^2; mass defect; binding energy; binding energy per nucleon curve; unified atomic mass unit

nodes.label: Nuclear Reactions
nodes.description: Nuclear fission and fusion; energy released; chain reactions; conditions for fusion

nodes.label: Radioactive Decay (H2)
nodes.description: Spontaneous and random nature; activity A = lambda N; decay constant; half-life t_1/2 = ln2/lambda; decay equations
